mission: Build a transparent auto-parts sourcing and sales business whose price is calculated from fully evidenced landed and operating costs plus exactly one Australian dollar, subject to lawful tax, consumer, warranty and channel obligations.
canonical_price_formula: customer_price = supplier_or_base_cost + freight_and_landed_cost + card_and_fx_fees + platform_or_marketplace_fees + taxes_and_duties + handling_and_packaging + returns_and_warranty_reserve + per_unit_operating_and_storage_allocation + 1_AUD
pricing_controls: Fail closed when a required cost component is missing or stale.
Store source, date, currency, exchange rate and calculation version for every quote.
Separate GST-inclusive customer display from internal cost components.
Recalculate when supplier, freight, FX, tax, platform or reserve inputs change.
Do not advertise Cost plus one dollar where exclusions, rebates or hidden charges make the statement misleading.
Require accounting and legal review of the formula, GST, consumer guarantees and representations before launch.
order_verification_controls: Unique order and purchase-order identifiers across suppliers and workshops.
Barcode or QR scanning where available, with photo, quantity, weight and manual fallback evidence where unavailable.
Supplier acknowledgement, pick confirmation, dispatch confirmation and delivery reconciliation.
Part-number, fitment, quantity and condition gates before customer release.
Exception queue for substitutions, partial shipments, duplicate orders, missing scans and mismatched weights.
shared_jarvis_routes: Jenok catalogue and fitment services only where licensed and applicable

blockers.detail: Full historical Cost plus one project chats, master-plan files and operating assumptions have not yet been physically ingested into the repository.
Supplier agreements, prices, feeds, freight terms and credentials are not proven.
Entity structure, GST, consumer-law, warranty, insurance and accounting treatment require professional confirmation.
Production hosting, database, payments, Xero, marketplace and logistics integrations require credentials and owner approval.
